questionHtml:
Sulfur dioxide reacts with oxygen to form sulfur trioxide.

2SO2 (g) + O2 (g) ⇌ 2SO3 (g)           ΔH = −197 kJ

Which change increases the value of Kc?

A.  increasing the temperature

B.  decreasing the temperature

C.  decreasing [SO2 (g)]

D.  decreasing [SO3 (g)]
